risk_reason: ASE's extensive manufacturing footprint includes multiple sites in China (Shanghai, Wuxi, Suzhou, Kunshan, Huizhou) and Taiwan, creating geopolitical concentration risk for chip module supply continuity.

ATI has expanded titanium production capacity (new Pageland, SC facility, 12,500-ton billet press) and secured long-term agreements with Boeing and Airbus, reducing supply disruption risk for titanium buyers.
